tasks.description: 1.1 Add Shadcn `AlertDialog` primitive if not already fully integrated
1.2 Add Shadcn `Sonner` primitive for alerts without confirmation
2.1 Refactor `views/ProfileSettings.tsx` to use `AlertDialog` instead of `window.confirm` for resetting data/profiles
2.2 Refactor `App.tsx` or its children to replace generic `confirm` behavior (e.g. deleting events)
2.3 Refactor `hooks/useTournamentExport.ts` to replace `window.alert` with Shadcn `Sonner` message
3.1 Verify data deletion and resetting flows work correctly with the new asynchronous dialogs
3.2 Verify application builds without errors (`npm run build`)

instruction:
All tasks are complete! This change is ready to be archived.
Consider running tests and reviewing the changes before archiving.
